summary: Full backend + frontend regression. 11/11 pytest backend tests pass. All 4 target frontend routes (/, /sentinel, /whales, /history) render correctly with the dark 'ARB TERMINAL' theme. Scan is complete (23,089 markets, 1,150 pairs, 300 shown in UI). Watchlist CRUD (add + delete) verified end-to-end via UI, calculator ROI logic + Maker/Taker toggle verified, Whale Tracker renders real Polymarket usernames (pleaseplease123, S-Works, RWCS...) with correct PNL/volume (no $NaN). No blocking issues found. NOTE: Per user request, POST /api/scan was NOT triggered.

issues: Kalshi shows 55 markets rather than 0 (contrary to review-request note); this is actually GOOD — Kalshi data is present.

critical_code_review_comments: backend/main.py: One 405 was seen in browser console for an unknown resource — could not reproduce a failing endpoint via curl; low priority, likely a favicon/health probe.

Backend files are largely well-structured; scanner + fetchers cleanly separated. Consider consolidating duplicate legacy backend server files (server.py vs main.py) if only one is being served — dead code hygiene.
Frontend market-browser.tsx is large (~1200 lines). Consider splitting the manual-pair modal and opportunities-table into subcomponents for maintainability.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (5/5 flows: sentinel, calculator, whales, history, watchlist CRUD)

seed_data_creation: Created + deleted TEST_market_cpi_2p5 watchlist entry and TEST_hist_market history entry as part of CRUD tests (cleaned up).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (frontend/.env). Pytest suite: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. DO NOT trigger POST /api/scan (5 min blocking, already complete). Kalshi actually returns 55 markets now (not 0). All data-testids working. Calculator uses data-testid='button-mode-maker'|'button-mode-taker' and card-scenario-N with text-roi-N/text-cost-N/text-margin-N. Watchlist form testids: input-market-name, select-site-a/b, input-site-a-yes/b-yes, button-add-watchlist. Sentinel opportunity table renders via plain HTML rows (not the leg-based text-question-N testid; visible content confirms 300 rendered rows).
